close_reason: Implemented ChunkReader with list_chunks, read_chunk, find_chunk_for_version, read_from_version, read_all_transactions, latest_version, oldest_version. Supports lazy streaming and replay workflow. All 25 tests pass.
description: Read header + directory (simulated range request). Binary search for target txn. Read from offset to end. Lazy stream listing for replay workflow. Tests: seek to version, forward scan, pagination.
title: Chunk reader
